long_description: Functions between Ensemble Start and Ensemble End are treated as independent ensemble members separated by Ensemble Member markers. Member predictions are aligned by sample IDs and then aggregated according to task type and aggregation method.

messages.ensemble_one_class_reference_class_enfor: Ensemble Start enforced One-Class Reference Class on enclosed one-class member functions.
messages.ensemble_one_class_unknown_label_enforce: Ensemble Start enforced One-Class Unknown Label on enclosed one-class member functions.

warnings.ensemble_classification_cv_predictions_m: Some ensemble members did not produce cross-validated class predictions ('class_cv_pred'). Ensemble cross-validation aggregation was skipped. Enable CV on all member functions to include ensemble CV outputs.
warnings.ensemble_regression_cv_predictions_missi: Some ensemble members did not produce cross-validated predictions ('y_cv_pred'). Ensemble cross-validation aggregation was skipped. Enable CV on all member functions to include ensemble CV outputs.
warnings.ensemble_classification_probability_fall: Classification input type is set to Probabilities, but one or more members did not provide required probability outputs/class labels. Ensemble fell back to hard class voting for the affected prediction target.
warnings.ensemble_classification_probability_ties: Soft-voting probability ties were detected. Ties are resolved by argmax on sorted class labels.

errors.ensemble_mixed_classification_families_n: Mixed one-class and n-class members are not supported in the same classification ensemble block. Use only one family per ensemble.
errors.stacking_requires_cv_config: Stacking requires a routed CV Configuration on Ensemble Start.
errors.stacking_requires_cv_enabled: Stacking requires CV Configuration with use_cv enabled on Ensemble Start.

layout.name: ensemble_task_type
layout.label: Task Type
layout.tooltip: Select regression or classification; this determines supported aggregation behavior

layout.name: classification_input_type
layout.label: Member Input Type
layout.tooltip: Classes: aggregate hard class label predictions. Probabilities: aggregate member probability outputs — soft voting for majority/weighted vote, probability columns as meta-features for stacking

layout.name: regression_aggregation_method
layout.label: Regression Aggregation
layout.tooltip: Aggregation method used when ensemble task type is regression

layout.name: classification_aggregation_method
layout.label: Classification Aggregation
layout.tooltip: Aggregation method used when ensemble task type is classification

layout.name: one_class_reference_class
layout.label: One-Class Reference Class
layout.tooltip: Optional class label used by one-class methods as the accepted/reference class

layout.name: one_class_unknown_label
layout.label: One-Class Unknown Label
layout.tooltip: Optional unknown/outlier label enforced across one-class members to keep label space consistent

layout.name: smp_cal
layout.label: Calibration Sample IDs
layout.tooltip: Routed sample IDs for calibration alignment (auto-matches smp_cal outputs)

layout.name: smp_val
layout.label: Validation Sample IDs
layout.tooltip: Routed sample IDs for validation alignment (auto-matches smp_val outputs)

layout.name: X_cal
layout.label: Calibration Features
layout.tooltip: Routed calibration feature matrix for stacking passthrough

layout.name: X_val
layout.label: Validation Features
layout.tooltip: Routed validation feature matrix for stacking passthrough

layout.name: class_data_cal
layout.label: Calibration Class Labels
layout.tooltip: Routed calibration class labels for one-class preparation and future class filtering

layout.name: class_data_val
layout.label: Validation Class Labels
layout.tooltip: Routed validation class labels used as reference labels in classification workflows

layout.name: cv_config
layout.label: CV Configuration
layout.tooltip: Routed CV configuration. Required when stacking aggregation is selected

layout.name: weights
layout.label: Member Weights
layout.tooltip: Comma-separated weights for weighted methods, for example 1,2,1

layout.name: stacking_use_passthrough
layout.label: Stacking Passthrough
layout.tooltip: Append original X features to meta-features when fitting/predicting the stacker

layout.name: stacking_n_jobs
layout.label: Stacking Parallel Jobs
layout.tooltip: Number of parallel jobs for compatible stacking estimators (for example random forest)

layout.name: stacking_verbose
layout.label: Stacking Verbosity
layout.tooltip: Verbosity level for compatible stacking estimators

layout.name: stacking_regression_model
layout.label: Regression Stacker
layout.tooltip: Meta-model used by regression stacking

layout.name: stacking_regression_alpha
layout.label: Regression Alpha
layout.tooltip: Regularization alpha used by ridge regression stacker

layout.name: stacking_regression_n_estimators
layout.label: Regression Trees
layout.tooltip: Number of estimators/iterations used by supported regression ensemble stackers

layout.name: stacking_regression_max_depth
layout.label: Regression Tree Depth
layout.tooltip: Maximum tree depth for supported regression tree-based stackers (0 = estimator default/unlimited depending on model)

layout.name: stacking_classification_model
layout.label: Classification Stacker
layout.tooltip: Meta-model used by classification stacking

layout.name: stacking_classification_c
layout.label: Classification C
layout.tooltip: Inverse regularization strength C for logistic regression stacker

layout.name: stacking_classification_max_iter
layout.label: Classification Max Iterations
layout.tooltip: Maximum training iterations for logistic regression stacker

layout.name: stacking_classification_n_estimators
layout.label: Classification Trees
layout.tooltip: Number of estimators/iterations used by supported classification ensemble stackers

layout.name: stacking_classification_max_depth
layout.label: Classification Tree Depth
layout.tooltip: Maximum tree depth for supported classification tree-based stackers (0 = estimator default/unlimited depending on model)

layout.name: stacking_classification_min_samples_leaf
layout.label: Classification Min Samples Leaf
layout.tooltip: Minimum samples per leaf for supported classification tree-based stackers

layout.name: stacking_classification_max_features
layout.label: Classification Max Features
layout.tooltip: Feature subset size per learner split/model; supports blank, int, float. sqrt/log2 apply to random_forest, extra_trees, and gradient_boosting

layout.name: stacking_classification_learning_rate
layout.label: Classification Learning Rate
layout.tooltip: Learning-rate shrinkage for supported boosting classification stackers

layout.name: stacking_regression_fit_intercept
layout.label: Regression Stacker Intercept
layout.tooltip: Whether the regression stacking meta-model includes an intercept term

layout.name: stacking_regression_min_samples_leaf
layout.label: Regression Min Samples Leaf
layout.tooltip: Minimum samples per leaf for supported regression tree-based stackers

layout.name: stacking_regression_max_features
layout.label: Regression Max Features
layout.tooltip: Feature subset size per learner split/model; supports blank, int, float. sqrt/log2 apply to random_forest, extra_trees, and gradient_boosting

layout.name: stacking_regression_learning_rate
layout.label: Regression Learning Rate
layout.tooltip: Learning-rate shrinkage for supported boosting regression stackers

layout.name: stacking_classification_fit_intercept
layout.label: Classification Stacker Intercept
layout.tooltip: Whether the classification stacking meta-model includes an intercept term

config.title: Ensemble Configuration

sections.short_description: Displays ensemble configuration: task type, aggregation method, member count, and member source names.
Stacking meta-model type and passthrough setting.

config.title: Regression Performance

sections.short_description: R2 and RMSEP/RMSECV metrics for calibration, cross-validation, and validation sets.
Individual member calibration predictions overlaid with the ensemble aggregated prediction. Navigate with the Member selector.
Individual member validation predictions overlaid with the ensemble aggregated prediction.
Ellipsoidal joint confidence region (EJCR) for OLS slope and intercept of ensemble calibration predictions. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased calibration.
Ellipsoidal joint confidence region (EJCR) for OLS slope and intercept of ensemble validation predictions. The ideal point (slope=1, intercept=0) inside the ellipse indicates unbiased prediction.

config.title: Classification Performance

sections.short_description: Accuracy, F1, precision, and recall for calibration, cross-validation, and validation sets.
Confusion matrix for ensemble calibration predictions.
Confusion matrix for ensemble cross-validation predictions.
Confusion matrix for ensemble validation predictions.
Sample-level calibration and cross-validation class predictions with mismatch indicators.
Sample-level validation class predictions with mismatch indicators.
